body.title: Inhibit generic Hello greeting when conversation is in-progress
body.result: PROC_GREET_AKIEN trigger fixed (removed 'akien'), PROC_SUPPRESS_MID_CONV_GREETING seeded at 0.97. Tests green.
body.description: GREETING_STANDARD fires on any greeting-intent match and emits 'Hello! What would you like to tackle?' — even mid-conversation. Need inhibitory memory: if recent channel activity within N minutes (akien or igor authored messages), suppress GREETING_STANDARD. Use inhibition_seeder or add inhibitor node child of GREETING_STANDARD that checks recency of last channel exchange. Trigger: LAST_CHANNEL_MSG_AGE < 5 min → inhibit greeting habit.
